original_statement: how many models were taller than 5 ft 11 inches?
mutated_statement: how many things were taller than a certain height?
mutation_analysis: Category generalization + Measurement vagueness: "models" (human models) generalized to "things" (generic entities) | specific height "5 ft 11 inches" replaced by vague "a certain height" (5 ft 11 inches → a certain height)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与simple_query的说明可识别出关键信息：日志中明确写道“Interpreting ‘a certain height’ as 175 cm (5 ft 9 in)”和“Interpreting the question as asking how many contestants were taller than 175 cm”，表明agent意识到原问题高度描述被替换为模糊项并作出了解释/假设。具体表现为：没有向用户反问或请求澄清，而是基于一个具体的假设（将“a certain height”解释为175 cm）继续计算并给出明确数值答案（7）。因此符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”类别——agent认知到不确定性但选择通过假设来解决并输出具体结果。
